lemon_market_new_listings.description: This car is in mint condition.

This vehicle is in mint condition. The exterior paint and body are flawless, with no scratches or dents. The interior is pristine, showing no signs of wear on the upholstery or carpets. All mechanical components and electronics are in perfect working order.

This vehicle is being sold in poor condition and is best suited for someone looking for a major project or a source for parts. The engine suffers from a significant oil leak and requires immediate attention to the transmission, which is currently slipping between gears. Cosmetically, the body has several rust spots, faded paint, and a cracked windshield, while the interior shows heavy wear and tear on the upholstery. It is recommended that the buyer hauls this vehicle away as it is not currently reliable for daily driving.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle remains in impeccable showroom condition, having been curated to the most exacting standards of preservation. With its flawless finish and an interior that retains its original luster, this represents a definitive opportunity for the discerning collector. An investment-grade acquisition for those who demand absolute perfection in their motorcars.

Hey there! You have seriously got to see this absolute gem! I have babied this car since the day I drove it home, and it honestly looks like it just rolled off the showroom floor. It is in pristine, spotless condition—not a single scratch or dent to be found, and that 'new car' feel is definitely still there. It drives like an absolute dream and has been tucked away in a garage every single night. If you're looking for perfection, this is the one! I'm so excited for the next owner to enjoy it as much as I have. Drop me a message and let's get you behind the wheel!

Offered is an exceptional E46 M3, featuring the legendary S54 inline-six engine equipped with individual throttle bodies and a 8,000 RPM redline. This example is mechanically flawless, with a documented VANOS overhaul and proactive subframe reinforcement via TMS plates to ensure structural rigidity. The ZF 6-speed manual transmission provides crisp, tactile engagement, paired with a variable M differential lock for optimal power delivery. The suspension retains its factory geometry with refreshed bushings and Bilstein dampers, maintaining the precise turn-in characteristics these chassis are known for. The exterior retains its original factory finish with zero oxidation, and the interior reflects a cabin that has been meticulously preserved in a climate-controlled environment. Full service history included.
Mint condition. Garage kept. Original paint. No mechanical issues. Clean title.

Presenting a true collector-grade masterpiece that has been preserved with obsessive attention to detail. This vehicle has been strictly garage-kept in a climate-controlled environment and has never seen inclement weather. The exterior paint retains its deep, factory-fresh luster, protected by a professional-grade ceramic coating; there are no stone chips, swirl marks, or blemishes to be found. Every body panel is perfectly aligned with zero history of paintwork or repairs. Inside, the cabin is a time capsule. The premium leather seats show no signs of bolster wear, the carpets are pristine, and all interior electronics—including the original infotainment system and switchgear—function with crisp, tactile precision. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach. It comes with a full, documented service history from authorized specialists, including a comprehensive fluid flush and multi-point inspection performed less than 100 miles ago. The engine bay is immaculate, and the undercarriage remains factory-clean. Included with the sale are both original keys, the complete owner’s manual set, and a binder containing every maintenance receipt from its original delivery to the present. This is a rare opportunity to own a vehicle that drives, looks, and smells exactly as it did on the showroom floor.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to a rigorous showroom standard. This unit exhibits flawless aesthetic integrity and mechanical precision, representing a rare opportunity for the discerning buyer to acquire a specimen in truly pristine condition. Every detail, from the immaculate interior finishes to the factory-spec performance, underscores a legacy of meticulous stewardship. This is a definitive acquisition for those who demand uncompromising quality.

Hey there! You seriously have to see this car to believe it. It is in absolute showroom condition—I’ve babied it since day one and it's been kept tucked away in a climate-controlled garage. It looks and smells brand new, and honestly, it drives even better than it looks! If you're looking for perfection, this is the one. Feel free to reach out with any questions, I'd love to show it to you!

Offering a collector-grade 2008 Porsche 911 Carrera S (997.1), a definitive example of analog performance. This specimen features the M97.01 3.8L flat-six powerplant, delivering a linear power band and visceral induction note through a precision 6-speed manual transaxle. The chassis is equipped with Porsche Active Suspension Management (PASM), providing exceptional damping control and maintaining roll stiffness during high-load cornering. Mechanically, this vehicle is flawless: bore scoring has been ruled out via professional scope, the Rear Main Seal (RMS) remains dry, and the IMS bearing is the revised large-nut variant. The exterior retains its factory-correct paint depth across all panels, and the undercarriage is pristine, showing no signs of heat-cycle fatigue or oxidation. Documentation includes a comprehensive DME overrev report showing zero ignitions in ranges 3-6. This is a turn-key, investment-quality 911 for the uncompromising purist.
Mint condition. Garage kept. No scratches or dents. Original paint. Smoke-free interior. Single owner. Full service history available.
